data.title: Cloudastructure to Participate in “Powering the AI Revolution” Virtual Conference Presented by Maxim Group LLC on Tuesday, April 7th at 9:00 a.m. EDT
data.description: Cloudastructure (Nasdaq: CSAI), a top player in AI-driven video surveillance and remote guarding services based in Palo Alto, CA, disclosed that its CEO James McCormick and CFO Greg Smitherman will partake in the "Powering the AI Revolution: Building the Infrastructure Behind Generative AI" online conference by Maxim Group LLC. The event is scheduled for Tuesday, April 7, at 9:00 a.m. EDT.

data.title: Bell Canada renews Medium Term Notes (MTN) program
data.description: On April 6, 2026, in Montreal, Bell Canada (Bell) revealed the submission of a prospectus supplement for the renewal of Bell's MTN program. This supplement was filed alongside a short form base shelf prospectus dated April 2, 2026, with regulatory bodies across all provinces in Canada. The MTN program, which is being renewed, plays a key role in Bell's investment strategy and financial activities.

data.title: PenFed Foundation for Military Heroes Sponsors Honor Flight for Puerto Rico's Veteran Community
data.description: From June 12 to 14, 2026, veterans will be flown from San Juan to Washington D.C. The PenFed Foundation for Military Heroes will be sponsoring an Honor Flight to recognize the service of Puerto Rico's veterans. This event will be held in TYSONS, Va., with the announcement made on April 6, 2026.

data.title: Mach Natural Resources LP Announces Secondary Public Offering of Common Units
data.description: In Oklahoma City, Mach Natural Resources LP (NYSE: MNR) (referred to as "Mach" or the "Company") disclosed plans for an underwritten public offering termed as the Offering. The Offering involves 9,000,000 common units representing limited partner interests in Mach. The Selling Unitholders, namely VEPU Inc., Simlog Inc., and Sabinal Energy Operating, LLC, will be offering the common units. It is essential to note that Mach itself will not be vending any common units through this Offering and will consequently not be gaining any proceeds from the transaction. The completion of the Offering is contingent on market conditions and other factors.

data.title: AGF Reports March 2026 Assets Under Management and Fee-Earning Assets
data.description: In Toronto on April 06, 2026, AGF Management Limited (TSX:AGF.B) announced that their total assets under management (AUM) and fee-earning assets stood at $59.1 billion as of March 31, 2026.

data.title: Integer Announces Board Leadership Transition
data.description: A medical device CDMO, Integer Holdings Corporation, based in Plano, Texas, revealed that Pamela G. Bailey, the current independent Chair of the Board, will not seek re-election at the upcoming 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on May 20. Subsequently, the Board plans to designate Donald J. Spence, a current director, as the new independent Chair. Integer Holdings Corporation is listed on the NYSE under the symbol ITGR.

data.title: Mawson Infrastructure Group Inc. Provides Governance Update
data.description: Partners with Endeavor Investor Group to Revamp Board Structure: An agreement has been reached between the company and Endeavor Investor Group to reconstitute the board of directors for better governance. This move comes amid efforts to enhance performance and transparency. The cooperation agreement involves a restructuring of the board, integrating new members from Endeavor Investor Group. The decision aims to leverage their expertise and diverse perspectives for the company's growth. This strategic partnership marks a significant shift in leadership, with this collaboration bringing in fresh ideas to steer the company in the right direction.

data.title: XMax Announces Formation of XMax AI Inc. to Execute AI Expansion Strategy
data.description: On April 6, 2026, XMax Inc (NASDAQ: XWIN) revealed the creation of its new subsidiary, XMax AI Inc., following approval from the Board for expansion into artificial intelligence on March 24, 2026. This move demonstrates a crucial step in the Company's strategic growth in the AI sector. The subsidiary was established on April 2, 2026, showcasing the Company's dedication to leveraging AI for technological advancement and future success.

data.title: VIZSLA SILVER PROVIDES ADDITIONAL UPDATE ON SITUATION IN CONCORDIA
data.description: In a recent announcement made on April 6, 2026, in Vancouver, BC, Vizsla Silver Corp. (TSX: VZLA) (NYSE: VZLA) (Frankfurt: 0G3) shared an update regarding the events unfolding in Concordia, Sinaloa. The Company disclosed that a total of nine team members are currently involved in the situation.

data.title: TriplePoint Venture Growth BDC Corp. Investment Grade Rating and Stable Outlook Confirmed by Morningstar DBRS
data.description: TriplePoint Venture Growth BDC Corp., a key financing provider for venture growth stage companies supported by top venture capital firms in technology and high-growth sectors, revealed that Morningstar DBRS has reaffirmed the Company's investment grade Long-Term Issuer Rating and Long-Term Senior Debt Rating at BBB (low). The rating confirmation was announced by Morningstar DBRS. TriplePoint Venture Growth BDC Corp. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol TPVG and is based in Menlo Park, California.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Up As Trump Offers This Olive Branch; AI Play Eyes Entry (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a notable increase along with Apple on the stock market. Despite ongoing threats, President Donald Trump extended a gesture of goodwill towards Iran. This positive development was covered in real-time by Investor's Business Daily, highlighting the growing interest in artificial intelligence (AI) investments. The market saw significant gains, reflecting investor optimism surrounding these events.

data.title: Brink’s Announces Amendment and Extension of its Credit Agreement in Preparation for NCR Atleos Acquisition
data.description: In Richmond, Virginia on April 6, 2026, The Brink’s Company, listed on NYSE as BCO, finalized an update and extension of its current credit facility on March 31, 2026. Brink’s is a prominent global company offering services for cash and valuables management, digital retail solutions, and ATM managed services. This amended and restated credit agreement marks a significant step for the company in terms of financial operations and strategic planning.

data.title: Trecora to Implement Surcharge for TRECOR™ with Elevated Costs
data.description: Trecora, a prominent North American manufacturer of high-purity materials, is announcing a surcharge of $0.07 per pound on all TRECOR™ grades starting immediately, or as agreements allow. This surcharge is crucial to guarantee a steady supply due to rising input costs and worldwide market circumstances. With headquarters in The Woodlands, TX, Trecora is a respected provider of advanced materials supporting a sustainable future.

data.title: Freeway to Convene 50+ Startups, Investors and State Leaders at AZ Tech Week Flagship Event on April 10
data.description: The Tech Talent Summit 5.0 alongside the Startup Pavilion is set to convene in Phoenix on April 10, 2026. Over 60 companies, investors, and industry pioneers will gather to fuel Arizona's burgeoning startup economy. This platform aims to bridge talent and capital, propelling growth in the state's startup sector.

data.title: AAERT and STAR Announce Plans to Form CAPTUR
data.description: On April 6, 2026, in New York, it was announced by the American Association of Electronic Reporters and Transcribers (AAERT) and the Society for the Technological Advancement of Reporting (STAR) that their respective Boards of Directors have voted unanimously to proceed with a merger.

data.title: CareTrust REIT Announces $119 Million of Recent Investments; Reloaded Pipeline
data.description: In Dana Point, California, CareTrust REIT, Inc. (NYSE:CTRE) disclosed the finalization of two investments amounting to around $119 million each, commencing from April 1, 2026. The acquisitions encompass a senior housing and skilled nursing campus based in Southern California, equipped with 120 licensed skilled nursing beds and 273 senior housing units. The campus is set to be triple-net leased to a current operator of the Company through a long-term lease agreement with yearly increments.
